mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yw_member_course ( member_id, course_id, accomplish_flag, learning_chapter_num, all_chapter_num ) SELECT #{memberId} AS member_id, e.id AS course_id, '0', '0', COUNT(ch.id) AS all_chapter_num FROM yw_course e LEFT JOIN yw_chapter ch ON ch.course_id = e.id WHERE e.id = #{courseId} group by e.id

INSERT INTO yw_member_chapter ( member_id, chapter_id, accomplish_flag ) SELECT #{memberId} AS member_id, e.id AS chapter_id, '0' FROM yw_chapter e inner JOIN yw_course ch ON e.course_id = ch.id WHERE ch.id = #{courseId}
